support_tickets.subject: Unable to download ticket PDF
support_tickets.message: Hello, I recently booked a seat for the Music Festival but when I click download ticket, the PDF returns an error. Please assist.

support_tickets.subject: Payout processing timeline question
support_tickets.message: Hi Admin, my event 'Summer Music Fest' ended yesterday. When will the payout be processed to my bank account?

replies.message: Hello, payouts are processed within 2-3 business days after the event completes. We are reviewing your event sales now.

support_tickets.subject: Change attendee details on booking
support_tickets.message: Hello, I bought two tickets but put the same name on both. Can I change one of them to my friend's name?

replies.message: Hello Alice, yes you can change details from your profile dashboard under tickets or let us know the name and we will update it for you.
Thank you, I was able to edit it from the profile page. Resolved!
